name: Reliance Industries Limited
notes: Group name — also watch for Reliance Retail, Reliance Jio (separate listed/unlisted entities). Default to RELIANCE (group parent) unless specific subsidiary mentioned.

name: Tata Consultancy Services Limited
notes: Safe — no common English collision

name: HDFC Bank Limited
notes: HDFC alone can be ambiguous (was HDFC Ltd the parent; now merged). Post-merger: HDFC alone → HDFCBANK.

name: Infosys Limited
notes: Safe — no collision

name: ICICI Bank Limited
notes: ICICI alone could mean ICICI Securities, ICICI Lombard — require 'Bank' or full name for ICICIBANK specifically

name: Hindustan Unilever Limited
notes: Brand aliases: Surf Excel, Dove, Lux, Lifebuoy (all HUL brands). Also acquired Horlicks (from GSK Consumer, delisted 2020).

name: Horlicks brand (now HUL)
notes: Horlicks brand acquired from GSK Consumer Healthcare (GSKCONS — delisted Apr 2020). Any Horlicks article post-2020 → HINDUNILVR

name: ITC Limited
notes: Safe in Indian financial context — no collision. ITC is a standalone abbreviation.

name: State Bank of India
notes: SBI alone is unambiguous in Indian finance context

name: Bajaj Finance Limited
notes: Distinguish from Bajaj Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO) and Bajaj Finserv (BAJAJFINSV)

name: Bajaj Auto Limited
notes: Disambiguate from Bajaj Finance — require 'auto', 'motorcycle', 'bike', 'two-wheeler', 'Pulsar', 'Chetak'

name: Bharti Airtel Limited
notes: Airtel alone is sufficient in India context

name: Wipro Limited
notes: Safe — no collision in financial context

name: Maruti Suzuki India Limited
notes: Safe — unique brand in Indian auto context

name: HCL Technologies Limited
notes: HCL alone can also mean HCL Corporation (private, US). Prefer 'HCL Tech' or 'HCL Technologies' for safer tagging.

name: Tata Motors Limited
notes: JLR articles → TATAMOTORS (JLR is owned by Tata Motors). Post-demerger: TATAMOTORS and TATAMTRDVR. Watch Yahoo ticker rename.

name: Tata Steel Limited
notes: Distinguish from Tata Motors, TCS — require 'steel' qualifier or TATASTEEL symbol

name: Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited
notes: Kotak alone is sufficient in financial context. Distinct from Mahindra (auto).

name: Axis Bank Limited
notes: Axis alone is ambiguous (axis the noun). Require 'Bank' or 'Axis Bank'.

name: UltraTech Cement Limited
notes: Safe — distinctive brand name

name: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited
notes: Safe — distinctive in pharma context

name: Asian Paints Limited
notes: HAZARD: 'Asian' and 'Paints' alone are ambiguous. Require full phrase 'Asian Paints' together.
disambiguation_rule: Require both words together as a phrase: 'Asian Paints'

name: Nestle India Limited
notes: Brand aliases: Maggi (flagship brand), KitKat, Nescafe, Munch — all Nestle India products. 'Nestle' alone (without 'India') may refer to global Nestle — flag if article is about Indian ops.

name: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited
notes: Safe in Indian infrastructure context

name: NTPC Limited
notes: Safe — unique acronym in Indian power sector

name: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited
notes: Safe — unique acronym

name: Divi's Laboratories Limited
notes: Safe — distinctive name

name: Cipla Limited
notes: Safe — unique brand in pharma context

name: Eicher Motors Limited
notes: Royal Enfield is a brand of Eicher Motors. Articles about Royal Enfield → EICHERMOT.

name: Grasim Industries Limited
notes: Liva is a brand of Birla Cellulose, a business unit of Grasim Industries (not separately listed). Aditya Birla Fashion (ABFRL) is a separate listing.

name: Hero MotoCorp Limited
notes: Hero alone is ambiguous. Require 'MotoCorp' or 'Hero Honda' or two-wheeler context.

name: Hindalco Industries Limited
notes: Novelis (US subsidiary) articles → HINDALCO. Hindalco is part of Aditya Birla Group.

name: IndusInd Bank Limited
notes: Safe — distinctive bank name

name: JSW Steel Limited
notes: JSW alone may refer to JSW Energy (JSWENERGY) — require 'Steel' for this ticker

name: Larsen & Toubro Limited
notes: L&T is the dominant short form in Indian finance. Ambiguity: L&T Finance (L&TFH), L&T Tech (LTTS) are separate listings.

name: Mahindra & Mahindra Limited
notes: HAZARD: 'Mahindra' alone can mean Mahindra Lifespace (MAHLIFE), Mahindra Finance (M&MFIN), Tech Mahindra (TECHM). Default M&M (auto parent) for generic 'Mahindra' unless context says otherwise.

name: Tech Mahindra Limited
notes: Always require 'Tech' to distinguish from M&M parent

name: Titan Company Limited
notes: HAZARD: 'Titan' is a common English word. Require financial context (NSE, results, shares) or brand alias. Tanishq/Fastrack/Sonata are Titan brands.
disambiguation_rule: Require at least one of: 'Company', 'NSE', 'shares', 'results', OR a brand alias in context

name: UPL Limited
notes: Safe — UPL is distinct in Indian agrochemical context

name: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited
notes: HAZARD: 'Adani' alone is group-level. Adani Ports, Adani Green (ADANIGREEN), Adani Power (ADANIPOWER), Adani Total Gas (ATGL), Adani Enterprises (ADANIENT) are all separate. Default: if 'Adani' + 'port'/'SEZ' → ADANIPORTS.

name: Adani Enterprises Limited
notes: The Adani group flagship. 'Adani' alone without a specific subsidiary → ADANIENT as default.

name: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited
notes: Safe — distinctive pharma name. Watch apostrophe variants.

name: Bajaj Finserv Limited
notes: Distinct from Bajaj Finance (BAJFINANCE) and Bajaj Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO)

name: Britannia Industries Limited
notes: HAZARD: 'Britannia' is also a historical/cultural word (refers to Britain). Require financial context or Indian market context.

name: Coal India Limited
notes: Safe — unique state-owned coal company

name: SBI Life Insurance Company Limited
notes: Distinct from SBI (SBIN) — require 'Life' or 'Insurance' qualifier

name: HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited
notes: Distinct from HDFCBANK — require 'Life' or 'Insurance' qualifier

name: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited
notes: HAZARD: Apollo Tyres (APOLLOTYRE) and Apollo Micro Systems (APOLLOMICRO) are separate listings. Require 'Hospitals' or 'health' context for APOLLOHOSP.

name: Page Industries Limited
notes: Jockey is the brand; Page Industries is the licensee listed on NSE. 'Jockey' in Indian financial articles → PAGEIND.

name: Jubilant FoodWorks Limited
notes: Domino's India franchise is operated by Jubilant FoodWorks. Also operates Popeyes and Dunkin' in India.

name: Bosch Limited
notes: NSE-listed Indian subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH. 'Bosch India' in articles → BOSCHLTD.

name: 3M India Limited
notes: NSE-listed. '3M India' in articles → 3MINDIA. Plain '3M' alone likely refers to global 3M, not Indian subsidiary.
